title: Temporary Disruption Of Service – IRD AEOI Portal
text: INLAND REVENUE DEPARTMENT PHONE: 784-457-1493 Grenville Street FAX: 784-457-1921 Kingstown EMAIL: svgird@gov.vc St. Vincent and the Grenadines DATE: 10 September 2025 TO: Common Reporting Standard (‘CRS’) Reporting Financial Institutions FROM: Comptroller Inland Revenue, Competent Authority, Automatic Exchange of Information (‘AEOI’) Subject: Temporary Disruption Of Service – Ird Aeoi Portal The Inland Revenue Department wishes to advise all CRS Reporting Financial Institutions that the AEOI Online Portal is currently experiencing a temporary disruption of service. Our technical team is working diligently to restore functionality in the shortest timeframe. A further notice will be issued once the service resumes. In the meantime, we kindly ask Reporting Financial Institutions to refrain from attempting to submit reports until confirmation of restoration of the system has been provided. The Department sincerely regrets any inconvenience this disruption may cause and thanks you for your cooperation and understanding. Should you have any questions or require further assistance, please contact: Technical Support: Ms. Timolin Richardson – trichardson@gov.vc / 1(784) 456-6099 General Support : Mrs.Kezi Francis/Ms. Chris-Ann Mofford -ird.aeoi@gov.vc /1(784) 456-6099 To become a modern tax administration, that promotes compliance, and delivers the highest quality of client service through a skilled and committed staff, thereby raising the required revenue to support the social and economic well- being of St. Vincent and the Grenadines.
